Fast Issuance

Prequalification and bond issuance for bids, permits, and contract starts, including contract bond placements for public and private projects.

License Compliance

Streamlined contractor license bond support for state and local requirements across multiple industries and professions.

Business Protection

Fidelity bond options designed to safeguard companies from employee dishonesty and protect client assets.

Nationwide Coverage

Compliant documentation and experienced agents supporting multi-jurisdictional filings and bonded work across all states.

Welcome to InspireSurety.

Your Trusted Surety Bond Partner Focused. Fast. Nationwide. Secure projects, licenses, and business obligations with a reliable surety bond partner — backed by access to over 8,000 commercial surety bond solutions for niche and large-scale needs.

![](/assets/images/Website-Home Page Image.webp)

Fast Issuance

Prequalification and bond issuance for bids, permits, and contract starts, including contract bond placements for public and private projects.

License Compliance

Streamlined contractor license bond support for state and local requirements across multiple industries and professions.

Business Protection

Fidelity bond options designed to safeguard companies from employee dishonesty and protect client assets.

Nationwide Coverage

Compliant documentation and experienced agents supporting multi‑jurisdictional filings and bonded work across all states.

Inspire Surety provides fast, compliant bond solutions for contractors, professionals, and businesses across all 50 states. Explore our full range of commercial and license bond services to find the right option for your next project or requirement.

Professional reviewing project files beside a glowing U.S. map, symbolizing multi‑state performance bond programs and ongoing capacity. Clean, corporate, no text.

![](/assets/images/Website-Home Page Image 3.webp)

Comprehensive Surety Bond Solutions

Inspire Surety provides support across license bonds, fidelity bonds, and commercial surety programs, helping businesses secure projects, maintain compliance, and operate with confidence.

Nationwide surety bond partner with fast issuance

Construction bond solutions including bid, performance, and payment bonds

Commercial and license bond options for contractors and regulated businesses

Bond issuance for bids, permits, and contract starts

Payment bond protection for subcontractors and suppliers

Bid bond support for competitive bidding and prequalification

Modern office scene with a contractor studying documents over a map showing multiple states, representing account‑based bonding. Bright, trustworthy, no text. Construction Bonds Simplified - How it Works 1 Quick, secure & trusted

A streamlined process for performance bonds, bid bonds, residential construction bonds, and subdivision construction bonds through a secure online system.

2 Fast and reliable

Efficient quote and bind workflows for performance bonds in construction, including bid and performance bonds and payment and performance bonds.

3 Buy securely online

Reliable issuance for construction bid bonds, public construction bonds, and construction maintenance bonds, with same‑day approvals in many cases.

![](/assets/images/Website-Home Page Performance Bond Image 2.webp)

Performance Bond $750K to $1.5M

Designed for general contractors requiring mid‑range performance bonds without CPA‑prepared financials. Supports high‑volume residential construction and small to midsize commercial projects through online underwriting and credit‑based evaluations.

Builder examining project documents for residential and small commercial performance bond needs. Explore Performance Bonds

Large commercial construction site with cranes representing capital‑based construction bonds up to $400M.

![](/assets/images/Website-Home Page Large Performance Bond Image.webp)

Commercial Construction Bond to $20M Capital‑Based Construction Bonds to $20 Million For established contractors with CPA‑prepared financials and professional submissions. Account‑based commercial construction bonds support aggregate program needs up to $20 million for medium‑to‑large companies.

Inspire Surety emphasizes long‑term partnerships with builders, developers, general contractors, and trade subcontractors, applying a practical, common‑sense approach to surety underwriting. Licensed to write bonds in all 50 states with flexible rating plans through partner sureties.

We Offer Account Based Performance Bonds Account‑based performance bonding supports businesses that require multiple surety bonds across states or jurisdictions. Instead of issuing bonds individually, a dedicated program provides ongoing capacity tailored to operational needs.

Collage of logistics, finance, energy, healthcare, government, environmental, and auto industries representing multi‑state performance bond users.

Commercial Surety Bonds From freight to fiduciary — broad commercial surety support including:

Licenses & Permit Bonds Mortgage Broker, Auto Dealer, Notary, Collection Agency & Escrow Bonds

Fiduciary Bonds ERISA Bonds, Probate/Guardian, Trustee Bond, Public Official Bonds

Financial Guarantee Bonds Patient Trust Funds Bond, Tax Bonds, Union Bonds, Utility Deposit Bonds

Government Agency Bonds BLM Bonds, US Custom Bonds, Oil & Gas Bonds, USDA Bonds

Valued Partners You are in good company.

Chubb Surety, Propeller Bonds, RLI Surety, Bond Exchange

Notary Bond Guide Notaries public serve as gatekeepers of trust in transactions large and small. A notary bond or notary public bond is a surety guarantee that the notary will follow the law, perform duties with honest...

Auctioneer Bond Guide An auctioneer bond is a compact but powerful guarantee that keeps auction markets honest. Whether you run a storefront auction house, an online platform, or act as a traveling auctioneer, an auction b...

Mortgage Broker Bond Guide Mortgage brokers and bankers require visible financial guarantees to operate with lender partners, regulators, and consumers. A mortgage broker bond or mortgage broker surety bond provides that guaran...

Nothing on this website should be construed as a solicitation, proposal, offer, recommendation, endorsement, or advice regarding any surety or insurance product. The information on this website is of a general nature and is not intended as a substitute for individual consultation with a licensed insurance professional. YOU ARE RESPONSIBLE FOR DETERMINING WHAT INSURANCE PRODUCTS YOU NEED AND IN WHAT AMOUNTS, BASED ON YOUR UNIQUE EXPOSURE TO RISKS AND ABILITY TO BEAR LOSSES. Stephen Wright is a licensed insurance agent in Arizona. Insurance products and features are subject to underwriting criteria and may not be available in all states.
